---
title: rgeos
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r knitr_config, include = FALSE}
source("_knitr_config.R")
```

******************************************************************************************

### gDIfference

### gDistance

### gIntersection

### gUnionCascaded
